sellers_note: Elevate your driving experience with the 2024 GMC Hummer EV Pickup 3X. This all-electric powerhouse delivers uncompromising performance and capability, redefining the boundaries of what's possible.Featuring a striking Supernova Metallic (Dark Blue) exterior and a host of premium features, this Hummer EV is designed to impress. Key highlights include:- Bose Centerpoint Premium 14-Speaker Surround Sound- Front Off-Road Auxiliary Lights (LPO)- MultiPro Tailgate Step Lighting (LPO)- Outside Rearview Mirror Projection Lights (LPO)- Accessory Touch-Screen Control Switches (LPO)- Front Footwell Interior LED Lighting Kit (LPO)- Heated and ventilated front seats- Heated rear seats- Soft Roll-Up Tonneau Cover (LPO)- 22'' x 9.5'' Premium Finish Painted Aluminum WheelsThis Hummer EV also boasts a robust suite of advanced technology and convenience features, including Apple CarPlay/Android Auto, a Navigation System, and an Exterior Parking Camera Rear.With an impressive EPA-estimated 59 MPGe in the city and 48 MPGe on the highway, this all-electric Hummer EV offers exceptional efficiency without sacrificing power and capability.Call Executive Chevrolet at (203) 265-0991 to schedule a test drive and experience the unparalleled performance of the 2024 GMC Hummer EV Pickup 3X. Customers will Receive FREE Maintenance for 2 Years with the purchase of any pre-owned vehicle for Executive Chevrolet! Includes Oil and Filter Change, Tire Rotation and more!
